title: Brent oil pulls back after climbing to $126 per barrel — 4-year high on U.S.-Iran escalation
snippet: Brent crude briefly hit $126/bbl overnight — highest since 2022 Russian invasion. Then pulled back to ~$111 after report Trump to be briefed on military options (paradoxically seen as potential resolution). US gas prices at 4-year high. Iran losing $500M/day per White House. Iran oil loadings collapsed from 2.1M bpd pre-war to 567K bpd.
tag_reason: Brent $126 is new wartime/4-year high, distinct from yesterday's $119; wild intraday reversal to $111
